texto: We do not pray in order to provoke God into action. If this is our view of prayer, then we are no different to the prophets of Baal who felt they had to manipulate their aloof, disinterested and fickle gods. Instead we pray because we have a God who has already shown himself to be always active in this world in the person of His Son Jesus, and because we have a confidence that He will continue to work for our good and His glory.
explicacao: Citação de James Krieg sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “We do not pray in order to provoke God into action. If this is our view of prayer, then we are no…” articula autoestima, prayer, reflexao em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
